title: Pilogyne mucronata
intro: There is limited information available on Pilogyne mucronata.
taxonomy: Pilogyne mucronata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Pilogyne, which is part of the order Gentianales. The classification of Pilogyne mucronata further categorizes it as a member of the family Rubiaceae, order Gentianales, and class Magnoliopsida. As a member of the family Rubiaceae, Pilogyne mucronata is closely related to other plants such as gardenias and coffee. Its classification as a flowering plant places it within the larger kingdom Plantae.
